runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Wanganui (17.87) in a Class 5 H, finishing a 9 length sixth. Goes very well from the draw boasting eight victories and six places from 25 starts. Can threaten.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Wanganui Straight over 313m. Last start finished 2nd over 305m at Wanganui beaten a nose (17.61) behind Sleepless May in a Class 3 on April 10. Boasts a course and distance PB in a scintillating 20.95. Well placed and should feature.

runners.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was a strong winner scoring by 0.8 lengths in a Class 2/3 at Wanganui Straight and recording a powerful 17.13 over the 313m journey. Big chance to make amends.
